heading: Art. 117a. Wrongful broadcast or distribution of intimate visual images
label: 917a Art. 117a. Wrongful broadcast or distribution of intimate visual images

children.label: A
children.text: is at least 18 years of age at the time the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct was created;

children.label: B
children.text: is identifiable from the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct itself, or from information displayed in connection with the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct; and

children.label: C
children.text: does not explicitly consent to the broadcast or distribution of the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct;

who knows or reasonably should have known that the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct was made under circumstances in which the person depicted in the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct retained a reasonable expectation of privacy regarding any broadcast or distribution of the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct;

children.label: A
children.text: to cause harm, harassment, intimidation, emotional distress, or financial loss for the person depicted in the intimate visual image or visual image of sexually explicit conduct; or

children.label: B
children.text: to harm substantially the depicted person with respect to that person’s health, safety, business, calling, career, financial condition, reputation, or personal relationships; and
whose conduct, under the circumstances, had a reasonably direct and palpable connection to a military mission or military environment,

children.heading: .—Broadcast
children.label: 1 .—Broadcast
children.text: The term “broadcast” means to electronically transmit a visual image with the intent that it be viewed by a person or persons.

children.heading: .—Distribute
children.label: 2 .—Distribute
children.text: The term “distribute” means to deliver to the actual or constructive possession of another person, including transmission by mail or electronic means.

children.heading: .—Intimate visual image
children.label: 3 .—Intimate visual image
children.text: The term “intimate visual image” means a visual image that depicts a private area of a person.

children.heading: .—Private area
children.label: 4 .—Private area
children.text: The term “private area” means the naked or underwear-clad genitalia, anus, buttocks, or female areola or nipple.

children.heading: .—Reasonable expectation of privacy
children.label: 5 .—Reasonable expectation of privacy
children.text: The term “reasonable expectation of privacy” means circumstances in which a reasonable person would believe that a private area of the person, or sexually explicit conduct involving the person, would not be visible to the public.

children.heading: .—Sexually explicit conduct
children.label: 6 .—Sexually explicit conduct
children.text: The term “sexually explicit conduct” means actual or simulated genital-genital contact, oral-genital contact, anal-genital contact, or oral-anal contact, whether between persons of the same or opposite sex, bestiality, masturbation, or sadistic or masochistic abuse.

children.label: A
children.text: Any developed or undeveloped photograph, picture, film, or video.

children.label: B
children.text: Any digital or computer image, picture, film, or video made by any means, including those transmitted by any means, including streaming media, even if not stored in a permanent format.

children.label: C
children.text: Any digital or electronic data capable of conversion into a visual image.
